description: Claude-Mem plugin configuration for OmnicoreX. Install with: /plugin marketplace add thedotmack/claude-mem
setup_instructions: 1. In Claude Code terminal: /plugin marketplace add thedotmack/claude-mem
4. Claude-mem will auto-capture tool usage and compress observations
5. Context from previous sessions will automatically appear in new sessions

integration_notes.layer: Auto-capture layer that supplements the manual JSONL/GitHub system
features: Progressive disclosure (high-level overview first, deeper on request)

mcp-memory-service.description: Advanced semantic memory with embeddings (already configured in mcp.json)
mcp-memory-service.install: Already configured — starts automatically via npx

continuous-claude-v3.description: PostgreSQL + pgvector cross-session learning with daemon monitoring
continuous-claude-v3.install: git clone https://github.com/parcadei/Continuous-Claude-v3.git && cd Continuous-Claude-v3/opc && uv run python -m scripts.setup.wizard
continuous-claude-v3.requires: Docker for local PostgreSQL, or remote PostgreSQL with pgvector extension
continuous-claude-v3.note: Recommended for advanced use when you need semantic recall across hundreds of sessions

mcp-memory-keeper.description: Lightweight MCP server for persistent context management

contextstream.description: Automatic memory via hooks — saves decisions, lessons, project context
